description: A Business Email Compromise (BEC) attack is underway. Several emails have arrived in your inbox appearing to be from 'Justin Mason' (the CTO). Some are legitimate, but others are spoofed phishing attempts using fake email addresses. Identify the fraudulent emails, create a folder named 'BEC-Quarantine', and move the spoofed messages into it. Draft an email to 'security@company.com' with the subject 'BEC Analysis Report' listing the fraudulent sender email addresses you discovered.
